# Xtreme Fitness Gym

> Premium fitness gym in Pratap Nagar, Jaipur (near NRI Circle). Strength, cardio, weight loss & certified personal training. ⭐ 4.8/5 from 188 Google reviews.

Xtreme Fitness Gym is a full-service fitness center in Pratap Nagar, Jaipur. We offer strength training, cardio, HIIT, weight loss programs, body building, CrossFit-style conditioning, and 1-on-1 personal training. Open 5:00 AM – 10:30 PM. Plans from ₹2,000/month or ₹12,000/year. Free trial available.

Contact: +91 9782089774 · Pratap Nagar, NRI Circle, Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

- [Home](/): Overview, hero, key programs, location, and contact

- [Reviews](/reviews): Member reviews and ratings
